title: Google Maps Company Scraper
description: Scrapes company data from Google Maps. Builds a natural-language query like 'AI Companies in Bangalore, India with 500 to 1000 employees' from your inputs.

searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Main keyword(s) to search for (e.g. 'AI Companies'). The actor will automatically append location and employee range. Leave empty to build the query fully from Industry Filter + Location.

location.title: Location
location.description: The city or region to search within. Automatically appended to the query.

industryFilter.title: Industry Filter (used if Search Query is empty)
industryFilter.description: Used to auto-build the query when Search Query is empty. E.g. 'IT Services' → 'IT Services companies in Bangalore...'

minEmployees.title: Minimum Employees
minEmployees.description: Appended to the query as 'with N to M employees' or 'with N+ employees'. Set to 0 to omit.

maxEmployees.title: Maximum Employees (optional)
maxEmployees.description: Combined with Minimum to produce 'with 500 to 1000 employees' in the query. Leave empty for no upper bound.

numResults.title: Number of Results
numResults.description: How many companies to extract. Maximum 500.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useProxy.description: Strongly recommended for large runs to avoid rate limits and bot detection.
